arts.ttl: The story behind Roberto Firmino PSG celebration as Liverpool seek new Champions League hero
arts.sum: Anfield is a venue where Champions League heroes are made, as Liverpool's Roberto Firmino discovered against Tuesday's opponents Paris Saint-Germain

arts.ttl: PSG predicted XI v Liverpool: Luis Enrique to field the same team as last week
arts.sum: PSG are tasked to overturn a one-goal deficit to qualify for the Champions League quarter-finals at Liverpool’s expense tonight at Anfield. Luis Enrique’s Les Parisiens must deliver a perfect display…

arts.ttl: 'I'm fuming at PSG arrogance as it happened to me - I know what Liverpool will be talking about'
arts.sum: Former Liverpool striker John Aldridge thinks Liverpool will go out and make a massive statement in their Champions League last 16 second leg clash with Paris Saint-Germain at Anfield

arts.ttl: Report: Mohamed Salah offered to Champions League club by his agent
arts.sum: Liverpool attacker Mohamed Salah is set to become a free agent in the summer. His future has still not been resolved since there is no agreement on a new deal for the Egyptian attacker at Anfield. arts.sum: The French side dominated the Reds for spells in Paris, but now face a monumental task at Anfield, with Luis Enrique bidding to reverse history

arts.ttl: The untold story behind Liverpool and PSG’s two scorelines
arts.sum: The Reds defend a 1-0 aggregate lead with Arne Slot adamant his side must improve after conceding 27 shots and registering just two at the Parc des Princes last week
